# Generated deep-note picks

One TOML file per **window end**:

`YYYY-MM-DD.toml`

These files are generated by:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=python .venv/bin/python -m rexy deep-notes pick --end YYYY-MM-DD
```

Do not create or edit them manually. They are audit/provenance records for
which public-brief overview items were selected for deep notes.

Example:

```toml
# Generated by rexy deep-notes pick. Do not edit manually.
window = "2026-05-10/2026-05-17"
generated_at = "2026-05-27T10:12:00Z"
source = "public_top3_overview_ai_sim"
item_ids = [
  "arxiv:2605.15185",
]
```

Deep notes are written under `KnowledgeCard_Inbox/` as final strict
KnowledgeCard input Markdown. The picker asks for explicit confirmation or
rewrite of `00｜为什么在意这篇` before each note is written. See
[`docs/templates/deep_note.md`](../../docs/templates/deep_note.md) for the
required structure and image rules.
